title: Juke Box Rhythm
writer: Mary C. McCall Jr., Earl Baldwin, Lou Morheim
actors: Jo Morrow, Jack Jones, Brian Donlevy
plot: While in New York to select her coronation wardrobe, Princess Ann is photographed dancing with Riff Manton, son of impoverished producer George Manton. A dress designer, Balenko, gives Riff a large commission when Princess Ann buy...
